title: Star Wars Planets
description: An addon for Ad Astra adding Planets From Star Wars and more !
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/812370942683643955/1055528720267493396/Sans-titre-12-transformed.png)

[![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1073717602880327761/1073720491279384616/Ad_Astra_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

##   
With this addon, you can go to the famous planets of Star Wars !

## There is a version for Fabric **and** Forge !

## Planets you can explore :

### Tatooine⏳  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/9fc9a9b019b51acfc589024cb2d43a0cfe8da624.png)

## Endor 🌲  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/4f55002683c1d741a8a9dbbf8f75257a2547413d.png)

### Hoth 🧊

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/04a1f2ce73d1b8901439ac9cd884dc561abdd186.png)

### Mustafar🔥

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sgQirvDi/images/769b41e9988291004e71f0b0827bc89f12785e7f.png)

### Planets are cool but what is cooler ? LIGHTSABERS!

![light sabers !](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/978717923948499055/984862875833221160/unknown.png)

There are more light sabers in the mod

Language available :

-   French
-   English
-   German (Thanks Grafjojo)
-   Korean (Thanks min_su_kim

You can use this mod in your Modpack !

  
A problem 🤨? Go to my discord server or/and report the issue in the github !  
- Discord : [https://discord.gg/nuDEYcFX4j](https://discord.gg/nuDEYcFX4j)  
- Issues : [https://github.com/TathanDev/StarWarsPlanets-AdAstra/issues](https://github.com/TathanDev/StarWarsPlanets-AdAstra/issues)
